programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Sketch slays Fiona's zombie, while Glen gives magician George a frightening new friend.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives Leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jay covers paramedic Anthony's tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice disguises Sonny's unwanted present from his mates. Sketch tackles Alex's drunken DIY teddy bear design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch is monkeying around with Jenny, Joe's Gary Lineker tat gets the red card and Alice fixes Sannahs unfortunate inking error.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sketch and Jay double team Luke's bum art, Alice eases Katie's period pain, Glen puts a snowman on ice while Sketch tattoos a butcher who minced his arm off.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team tackle Sam's embarrassing tattoo, which has earned him a serious ultimatum, deal with holiday ink that Ryan doesn't remember getting, and rid Adam of a lasting reminder of his ex.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Alice rids Sammie of an unladylike error, and Sketch erases Lloyd's misunderstood etching.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice cooks up a treat for ex-chef Melody. Jay helps Az make a wise choice about his past.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Michael needs help with a holiday tattoo that's writing cheques his anatomy can't cash. Superfan Emma wants to commit to ink her love for Cheryl Fernandez-Versini. A fire-eater lights up Jay's eyes.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Sketch slays Fiona's zombie, while Glen gives magician George a frightening new friend.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Alice paints over Francesca's pitiful Picasso. Sketch gives Madison a memorial to her mum.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Glen rids Riley of her Valentine's issues, Jay fixes Leon's bedroom problems, Alice works on Suzanne's cocky Cupid, and Sketch divorces Jordan from his tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: The artists cover Zoe's tattoo dedicated to her favourite food, Sean's lewd and lengthy leprechaun that his wife wants rid of, and Chantal's pitiful pop portrait that looks like a famous footballer.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway travel under Hampstead Heath to visit the incomplete North End station. Though abandoned before completion, this station was reborn during the Cold War as a nuclear bunker.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused parts of Piccadilly Circus, perhaps the grandest station on the London Underground, and visit the long-abandoned Highgate surface station.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the hidden parts of Euston, including unique features not found elsewhere, They also examine the bits which are set for demolition to make way for HS2.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: It's all about feeling the wind in your hair as the lid is lifted on the Pagani Huayra Roadster BC. Take a look behind the scenes at the production facility in Northern Italy with founder and Chief Designer Horacio Pagani.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Explores a variety of off-road vehicles, including the modern Land Rover Defender. In addition, Titch Cormack travels to Cornwall to uncover the story behind the Second World War's Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to a secretive production facility in Sweden to look at the Koenigsegg Regera, a Swedish supercar. Titch Cormack lifts the lid on the world's first supercar, the Jaguar XK120.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: Take a behind-the-scenes tour of Bugatti's production facility in Molsheim. Plus, Titch Cormack uncovers a luxury car from the 1920s: the Rolls Royce Silver Ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A grand tour of the Ferrari Roma production facility in Northern Italy. Titch lifts the lid on an icon of the sixties, the series one Jaguar E-type.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: The armoured BMW X5 is the perfect hybrid of when armoured cars meet supercars. Titch Cormack reveals just what it takes to design and build a car that can come under enemy attack.

programme.title: Secrets of the Supercars
programme.desc: A visit to the Croatian production facility of the Rimac C Two. Titch Cormack hits the jackpot when he discovers a barn full of a game-changing technically advanced Aston Martin Lagonda's.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The startling truth behind historical legends. Jamie Theakston investigates the curious claim that the Nazis were engaged in building flying saucers during World War II.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston brings to light the life and work of enigmatic inventor Nikola Tesla. Conspiracy theorists believe that the Serb was hushed up - but why?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston sheds light on the ultra-secretive Rosicrucian Order, whose members included Leonardo Da Vinci and Isaac Newton. Are they the real-life 'illuminati'?

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: An Ethiopian church claims to be housing the Ark of the Covenant. But is their assertion to be believed? Join Jamie Theakston as he ascertains the truth.
programme.sub-title: The Real Ark of the Covenant

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: April 30, 1945. Adolf Hitler kills himself as the Allies close on Berlin. Or did he? Jamie Theakston posits the shocking theory that the Fuhrer escaped.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The identity of the Man in the Iron Mask, a nameless prisoner held during the rule of Louis XIV, is an enduring mystery. Jamie Theakston unravels the enigma.
programme.sub-title: The Man in the Iron Mask

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Knights, castles and round tables are all part of the enduring King Arthur legend. Is there any truth to it? Hear the various claims to his origins.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance at Christmas
programme.desc: Heavy snow in the West Midlands wreaks chaos and two separate crews treat patients, both called John, who have both broken their hips after falling.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance at Christmas
programme.desc: Aaron and Chris are called to a man who has been stabbed, while Deena and Mike help an elderly lady who has fallen in the street.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance at Christmas
programme.desc: Lee and Nicole help a baby who has a seizure, meanwhile Ash and Toni treat a young man with breathing difficulties, it is made harder as the young man doesn't want to go to hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie and Stuart race to a supermarket where a man has collapsed doing his Christmas food shopping, they hope to save the man and get his Christmas back on track. Dan and Holly visit a familiar patient.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance at Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas Day and Richard and Adam help a family who face a tragic loss, while Dan and Becky are called out to a baby with a high temperature.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance at Christmas

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy
programme.desc: Judy Murray captains a team of celebs hoping to ace their way to the Crystal Dome. Paralympic David Weir, footballer Wayne Bridge, Countdown's Rachel Riley and TV’s Charlotte Crosby all combine to tackle skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 12
programme.desc: TV presenter Laura Whitmore Captains her team; comedian Chris Ramsey, dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and retired rugby player Gareth Thomas into a world of physical, mental, skilful and mysterious challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: This gathering of the Crystal Maze is captained by actor Sunetra Sarker as she pilots plucky TV broadcaster Matthew Wright, seasoned politician Anne Widdecombe actor Nikki Sampson and reality TV Hunk Wes Nelson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 6
programme.desc: This week’s intrepid band of celebrity Mazekateers are ably led by ‘dad vibe’ BAFTA winning actor and League Of Gentlemen lynchpin Steve Pemberton. Hot stepping support comes in the form of Strictly’s Oti Mabuse and Naked Attraction’s Anna Richardson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crystal Maze team captain actor Nancy Sorrell leads her fellow adventurers, comedian Jim Moir (AKA: Vic Reeves), reality TV’s Ferne McCann, former cricketer Graeme Swann and comedian Susan Calman, on a wild ride through the 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard
programme.desc: This week broadcasting legend Richard Madeley captains his team featuring comedian Joe Wilkinson, broadcaster Kate Garraway, Blue Peter’s Radzi Chinyanganya, and Pussycat Dolls star Ashley Roberts.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode has actress Tamzin Outhwaite commandeering former cricketer Phil Tufnell, TV Doctor Dr Ranj Singh, reality TV star Francis Boulle and Comedian/TV presenter Joel Dommett through a phalanx of challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's celebrity adventurers are Spencer Matthews, Stacey Solomon, Tom Allen, Andrea McLean and Joe Swash.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gemma Collins – with team mates James “Arg” Argent, legendary TV personality Carol Vorderman, comedian Ellie Taylor and TV presenter Rick Edwards fighting to maintain any sense of decorum and to get a word in edge wise.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 8
programme.desc: This show sees DJ Matt Edmondson lead his teammates TV legend Debbie McGee, dancer Kimberley Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 9
programme.desc: Pop star and captain Fleur East leads this thespian filled episode of the Crystal Maze guiding actors John Thompson, Nina Wadia and Natalie Cassidy as well as realty TV’s Georgia “Toff” Toffolo on a wild ride full of twists and turns in every zone.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie
programme.desc: Olympic legend Dame Kelly Holmes takes charge of grime MC Big Narstie, actress Jorgie Porter, internet superstar Alfie Deyes and fellow gold medallist Greg Rutherford on an action-packed journey to the Crystal Dome.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 12
programme.desc: This week’s adventurers call themselves Team Loveit.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 15
programme.desc: The Ali Family are arguably the strongest team on paper ever to face the maze. Will they score a perfect ten in the zones?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 9
programme.desc: This week the Hauxwell tackle the maze with remarkable results. How bad can it get in the maze? You’re about to find out…

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's team, Let's Get Medical, are a group of medical students. Your lives may soon be in their hands. You may have concerns after witnessing this lot attempt to tackle the mighty maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 1
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade returns with a new series of everyday adventurers hoping to make it to the Crystal Dome, starting with The Gamers.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tonight's team are called The Vikings because they spend most of their spare time living like Vikings. As they travel through the zones they'll be answering the question, 'can you ever have too much testosterone in a room'?

programme.title: Mob Wives: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Karen throws a pre-nup party to educate the ladies about protecting their assets; Carla reveals disturbing news; Drita hires staff for her store.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Ramona shares her wedding plans, but Karen continues to offer unwelcome advice. Plus, Drita throws a 1980s-theme bash, where Love faces Carla, leading to a battle royale.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew discusses the brawl between Carla and Love; Ramona and Karen reveal the reasons they dislike Carla.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Miami Monkey: Miami Monkey
programme.desc: Big Ang is in South Beach to open a new bar - The Miami Monkey. She enlists the help of her daughter Raquel, Raquel's twenty-something friends from Staten Island, and a team of hot Miami bartenders.

programme.title: Mob Wives starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: South Park: Pink Eye
programme.desc: Pink Eye: It's Halloween and Kenny is killed by a falling space station and turned into a zombie by some embalming fluid contaminated with Worcester sauce. The zombie disease spreads. (S1, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin: During a Terrance & Phillip ad-break the boys decide to adopt an Ethiopian child, swayed by the promise of a free digital watch. Mobs of wild turkeys rampage through town! (S1, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey the Christmas Poo
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Tom's Rhinoplasty
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Tom's Rhinoplasty
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom is a Dirty S**t (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)
programme.sub-title: Cartman's Mom is a Dirty S**t (Part 1)

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat F of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Ron and Panic Attack teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of `Robot Wars', see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat H of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Sting, Loco and Wizard teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat I of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the King Buxton and All Torque teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of `Robot Wars' series 2, more exclusive footage as access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of the week's competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A new spinner has something to prove and a family team pour blood, sweat and tears into keeping their robot wars dream alive. The robots compete through brutal group battles and fierce head to heads for a place in the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The challenge for competitors is even tougher as the infamous House Robots have been let off the leash in a new twist. This is the second heat, and only one of the eight teams can go through to the series grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four teams progress into a mini league going head to head in a bid for points. The top two teams will face each other in the heat final for the chance to secure their place in this series' grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This fourth heat is an explosive display of spinners as old favourites take on new hopefuls. They must dodge the arena hazards and the menacing new twist as house robots are unleashed to attack competitors and inflict maximum damage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The reigning champions Apollo mount their defence of the title. They face stiff competition from Ms Nightshade, Coyote, Rusty, Crackers'N'Smash, Meggamouse, Trolley Rage and Carbide.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It is the grand final and the teams must dodge the arena hazards and, in a menacing new twist, they can also hit the Arena Tyre to unleash the dreaded House Robots, allowing them to inflict maximum damage anywhere in the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Olympic athletes' the Brownlee brothers, DJ Scott Mills, space scientist Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock and sport's presenter Suzi Perry help design their own fighting robots to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Paralympic gold medallist Kadeena Cox, international football legend Robbie Savage, presenter Neil Oliver and popstar Jordan from Rizzle Kicks help design their very own fighting robot to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Possessed
programme.desc: Mary Vogel, a spiritual counselor for ten years, has a run in with a demonic force.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Shadowman
programme.desc: Tim Yancey and his older brother Tom love playing in the woods surrounding their Florida home. One afternoon Tom senses a presence watching him from among the shadows. Days later, the same entity confronts Tim and chases him through the woods.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes of the Past
programme.desc: The Johnson’s young daughter reveals that two fairies visit her room each night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Living Nightmare
programme.desc: Angela, a newlywed, is excited to start her new life with Stephen when nightmares that she experienced as a child suddenly resurface. Soon the menacing old hag from her dreams terrorizes her daughter and takes temporary possession of her son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: A Haunting: Love Curse
programme.desc: When Lee and his new bride Claire settle into their first home, an evil entity emerges and attacks Claire while she's carrying the couple's unborn baby. A ghost hunter determines the dark spirit is a demon and brings in demonologists to cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spirits of the Dead
programme.desc: The Whitley’s buy a farmhouse that houses a negative presence. The presence turns physical.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear House
programme.desc: Steven LaChance begins to experience strange things inside his house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: A Haunting: Trapped In Terror
programme.desc: Soon after moving into an older home in a quaint suburb of Cincinnati, OH, Taylor Jones catches her mother practicing black magic in her daughter Isabelle’s bedroom. Her fears become reality when Taylor notices Isabelle playing with an invisible friend.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: Medium: Pilot
programme.desc: Allison, a pre-law student, and mother of three discover that she is able to help the helpless, but not by using her law books.

programme.title: Medium: Suspicions and Certainties
programme.desc: Desperate to convict a serial killer Devalos calls in Allison to help with the jury, giving her the opportunity to prove herself.

programme.title: Medium: Night of the Wolf
programme.desc: Allison is convinced that a witness has given a bogus description of the man who killed to fiance and is determined to track down the real killer.

programme.title: Medium: Coming Soon
programme.desc: Allison's powers heighten when she finds herself able to not only see the past, but also to see the future.

programme.title: Medium: The Other Side of the Tracks
programme.desc: A reoccurring dream keeps Allison from getting sleep and begins to interfere with her life and her job.
programme.sub-title: The Other Side of the Tracks

programme.title: Medium: In Sickness & In Adultery
programme.desc: Allison is convinced Joe is having an affair while at the same time Devalos asks Allison to lie under oath for him.

programme.title: Medium: Lucky
programme.desc: Allison is disturbed when she has a dream about the death of her step-brother but is more concerned with his mental health when he shows up on her doorstep.

programme.title: Medium: Jump Start
programme.desc: Allison finds herself drawn to a cliff only to discover the body of a dead girl and learns that the only suspect is another lawyer.

programme.title: Medium: A Couple of Choices
programme.desc: Allison helps a detective solve a cluster of investigations that everyone believes are murder-suicides, but he believes are homicides.

programme.title: Medium: Coded
programme.desc: Allison and Joe must come to terms with the reality that their daughter Ariel shares Allison's supernatural gift.

programme.title: Medium: I Married a Mind Reader
programme.desc: When Allison becomes sick, her medicine heightens her abilities and unravels a murder case from the 1960s involving a Hollywood couple.

programme.title: Medium: A Priest, A Doctor, And A Medium Walk Into An Execution Chamber
programme.desc: After witnessing her first execution, Allison is called upon when the ghost of the same man is suspected of murder.
programme.sub-title: A Priest, A Doctor, And A Medium Walk Into An Execution Chamber

programme.title: Medium: Being Mrs. O'Leary's Cow
programme.desc: Allison must decide if putting a killer in jail is worth the lives of hundreds of innocent people.

programme.title: Medium: Penny for your Thoughts
programme.desc: Allison discovers that an innocent man has been in prison for 15 years, and the real murderer may be unstoppable.

programme.title: Medium: In The Rough
programme.desc: Kathy Baker guest stars as Joe's Mother.

programme.title: Medium: When Push Comes to Shove (Part 1)
programme.desc: Arliss Howard reprises his role as Capt. Push of the Texas Rangers in the season finale cliffhanger.

programme.title: Medium: When Push Comes to Shove (Part 2)
programme.desc: Captain Push remains in a coma and Allison finds herself unable to dream, in the chilling conclusion to the cliffhanger finale.

programme.title: Medium: The Song Remains the Same
programme.desc: Musical lyrics lead Allison on a wild goose chase to find a missing coed.

programme.title: Medium: Time Out of Mind
programme.desc: Allison discovers unsettling news when Medical Records from the 1950s document a mentally ill woman claiming to have been Allison Dubois.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Things are far from simple for the recovery crews this week. When a loaded HGV suffers a puncture on a busy motorway, Crouch recovery op Jim Howard and heavy vehicle mechanic Jack Watson, are called to the scene.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A digger has fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken down trailer back safely to it

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: At Crouch HQ, there is excitement in the air as the team help to make trucking superfan Chris's wedding day extra special. Snod is called to recover two crashed cars from the side of the M69 - the exact stretch of road that his friend was killed on while

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Dave and Adam are under pressure to recover a 100 tonne train engine before it sinks into the soft ground. Jim has to rescue a lorry that has become stuck in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A luxury coach gives up the ghost on a busy motorway slip road. A straightforward job segues into disaster for Marta. Scott races to recover a damaged trailer before dark descends.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jim must rescue a 32-tonne truck from a soft dirt embankment. Chris manouevres a skip lorry out of city centre traffic. Marta is driven around the bend trying to deliver a 48-foot articulated bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A recycling plant needs two old portable cabins swapped out for new ones, making for some serious heavy lifting for Nick. Jim sees to an old Toyota abandoned in a live lane on the M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jim and his team face a difficult foggy morning on the M1 when a crash between two artics causes a five-mile-long tailback.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Veteran driver Jim attends an emergency call-out to recover a lorry that has broken down bang in the middle of a busy ring road. Motor racing fanatic Merrie has a hunch she may have landed her dream job when she attends a broken down lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Steve and the team find themselves in deep water when they attempt to recover a car that has crashed into a river. Jim is tasked with recovering a van that has become wedged on top of a garden wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: Steve battles rush hour traffic to manoeuvre his recovery vehicle around the narrow roads to get to a 7.5-tonne lorry out of a ditch, while Rory must deliver a dodgy van to a scrapyard for destruction.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern's only female driver Merrie is tasked with the removal of an abandoned lorry, but it is soon clear this will not be a routine job. As she takes a closer look, she discovers that not only has the lorry been used as a mobile home, but that it is hou

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: Rory risks life and limb to recovered a skip lorry from the M1. Jim has a happy reunion with his own truck. Chris has to find a way of separating two HGVs that have somehow become wedged together.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Jim faces mayhem on the motorway when a massive pile-up blocks the busy M1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Marta and Pat have to pull a bin lorry out of a muddy ditch. But first they must battle their way through a thick wall of thorns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Jim and Steve face one of their riskiest recoveries when a tanker carrying highly corrosive pure sulphuric acid smashes into the central reservation of a busy A road and overturns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: It is all hands to the pumps at a bus depot in Tamworth, where Crouch's finest are joined by Lanterns' Merrie. Just days after Christmas the owners lost their school coaches to a devastating fire and need the wreckage removed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: A smouldering, 44-tonne food lorry blocks an M1 slip road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A milk tanker needs rescuing from a boggy field.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac
programme.desc: Widespread thievery is discovered in the city when Ninja Turtle artifacts are found missing. April and Irma prowl for the pilfering poachers, the investigation leads the reporter to the estate of Monroe Q.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Menace Maestro, Please
programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day
programme.desc: The half-shelled heroes find themselves competing with Bruce Bent, the Gadgetman, a self-proclaimed superhero from the past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.
programme.sub-title: Son of Return of the Fly II

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Knocks 'Em Dead!
programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe
programme.desc: When Bebop and Rocksteady steal the Anxietron Ray, they use it to scare the dickens out of everyone in their path, including the Turtles.
programme.sub-title: Bebop and Rocksteady Conquer the Universe

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.
programme.sub-title: Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up
programme.desc: Tired of constant nagging about discipline, Raphael, Michelangelo and Donatello use a Personality Modifier on Leonardo to get him to lighten up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Were-Rats of Channel Six
programme.desc: Finding a canister of unstable mutagen, the Rat King turns April and Vernon of Channel Six News into giant were-rats. As the transformed newshounds terrorize the city, Bebop and Rocksteady arrive to collect some explosives for Shredder and Krang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo
programme.desc: Talbot Breech is short, fussy and the insane inventor of a shrinking ray. His hobby is to miniaturize the biggest ships afloat; only today, he's caught Michelangelo in his diabolical ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Fin
programme.desc: In a dark plot to rule the world, Dr. Polidorius has created a man-fish using an evolution accelerator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rhino-Man
programme.desc: When multi-billionaire J. Gordon Hungerdunger sponsors a superhero competition, the city goes crazy with good guys.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman
programme.desc: Meet Bugman: he's Michelangelo's favourite comic book mutant superhero of all time. And today, he's real and in trouble.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Riptide: Diamonds Are For Never
programme.desc: While in the theater watching Bambi, Murray encounters an upset woman. It turns out she just witnessed the killing of a good friend of hers who turns out to be a diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Riptide: The Hardcase
programme.desc: A young woman spurned is a suspect in a murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Four-Eyes
programme.desc: The boys are hired by a guy to keep tabs on his wife. It seems he wants to divorce her and he wants ammo to avoid giving her alimony.

programme.title: Riptide: #1 With A Bullet
programme.desc: When a music star is killed in a car accident and the equally famous passenger gets injured, the Riptide agency gets hired by his fanclub to deliver flowers to his hospital bed.

programme.title: Riptide: Long Distance Daddy
programme.desc: Nick's sponsor child comes from Cambodia to the USA so his sister can undergo heart surgery.

programme.title: Riptide: Double Your Pleasure
programme.desc: Cody's flirt with a pretty girl sends the boys on a search for her apparently missing sister. Her ties to a mobster make them a target for him and his goons.

programme.title: Riptide: Raiders Of The Lost Sub
programme.desc: Well educated, but just as goofy, Murray's sister shows up unexpectedly, and persuades the boys to look for a sunken WW2 German submarine.

programme.title: Riptide: Something Fishy
programme.desc: Boz and Nick both fall for the same beautiful dolphin-trainer, whose charges become implicated as accomplices in a drug-smuggling scheme.

programme.title: Riptide: Where The Girls Are
programme.desc: The Riptide trio is tasked with protecting three high maintenance women from kidnappers during their California vacation.

programme.title: Riptide: The Orange Grove
programme.desc: An army general they befriended in Vietnam, is suspected of dealing cocaine, and the boys are pressured by the FBI to Lure him out.

programme.title: Riptide: Catch Of The Day
programme.desc: A murder at sea is witnessed by a girl swimming, who relays it to a mentally challenged fisherman.

programme.title: Riptide: Mirage
programme.desc: One of Murray's students asks his help to get away from her abusive husband. He agrees to help the beautiful woman, but soon finds out she is not as innocent as she appears to be.

programme.title: Riptide: Beat The Box
programme.desc: Murray's lie detector causes aggrevation for Nick and Cody, but also proves quite helpful when a writer they are hired to protect jumps from a high building.

programme.title: Riptide: Father's Day
programme.desc: The guys are asked by a priest to help a young single mother. They eventually learn that the father is a high ranking police man who is in line to be Chief.

programme.title: Riptide: Be True To Your School
programme.desc: When Nick goes to his high school reunion, some men shoot up the place. He later learns that some of his classmates and a teacher are involved in illegal activities.

programme.title: Riptide: It's A Vial Sort Of Business
programme.desc: The guys are hired by a couple who are concerned that their son who was going to college dropped out and went to work in a fast food restaurant.
programme.sub-title: It's A Vial Sort Of Business

programme.title: Riptide: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well
programme.desc: When the Riptide agency is hired to catch a thief in a luxerous beach club, they come across an old lifeguard pal of Cody's.
programme.sub-title: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well

programme.title: Riptide: Catch A Fallen Star
programme.desc: When a mobster's son is out to kill a former actress the boys protect and help her to retrieve the property deed to Pier 56.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Mechanic/Realtor
programme.desc: Nathan convinces a mechanic to verify his estimates with a polygraph test, and rebrands a realtor to sell only ghost-free homes.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Souvenir Shop/E.L.A.I.F.F.
programme.desc: Nathan sets up a fake film shoot in an effort to boost sales at a Hollywood souvenir shop, but his plan gets complicated when he discovers that he may have committed fraud.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Pet Store/Maid Service
programme.desc: Nathan places a controversial ad in a pet cemetery, takes tips from a focus group in order to become more likable and devises a method to clean a house in six minutes flat.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Liquor Store/Exterminator/Car Wash
programme.desc: Nathan comes up with a way to sell alcohol to minors, helps an exterminator land a hotel contract and uses birds to draw customers to a car wash.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Dumb Starbucks
programme.desc: Nathan makes use of parody law to open up a coffee shop nearly identical to Starbucks in its branding and appearance.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Taxi Service/Hot Dog Stand
programme.desc: Nathan comes up with a way to get a failing taxi company some much-needed press and implements a risky new line-cutting policy at a hot dog stand.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Toy Company Movie Theatre
programme.desc: Nathan markets an unappealing children's toy, devises a way to shame people who share their movie snacks and pitches a reality show starring Simon the security guard.

programme.title: Nathan For You: Electronics Store
programme.desc: Nathan tries to leverage Best Buy's price-matching policy by advertising a deal on TVs that's too good to be true.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Lord of the Ring
programme.desc: Umma tries to find her missing wedding ring before Appa does. Jung crashes Janet's yoga class.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Trollop
programme.desc: Only the Mehtas, Janet and Gerald know thus far that Raj cancelled his wedding with only the latter two knowing he did so because he is still in love with Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Couch Surfing
programme.desc: Appa is reluctant to have a house guest, but Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor. Jung accuses Janet of being coldhearted and Shannon tackles workplace bullying .

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Help
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet. Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess. Meanwhile, Shannon is finally single but isn't sure if Jung will make a move.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Happy Ummaversary
programme.desc: Janet plans to get the Kim family together for their first family dinner in 15 years, but it almost proves too much for Jung and Appa to handle.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thinkin' About Inkin'
programme.desc: Janet considers a new tattoo. Jung and Shannon exchange five-week-iversary gifts. Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Soccer Dad
programme.desc: Appa unwittingly becomes Jung's soccer coach. Umma insists that Janet learn to cook. Shannon forces a birthday party on Stacie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Beacon of Truth
programme.desc: Appa eavesdrops on Gerald and Chelsea getting together to tell a lie to her parents. Appa says that he knows whenever Janet has told a lie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chammo!
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Which Witch is Which
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: In the Bedroom
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement. Jung pursues a new career and tries to involve Janet. Meanwhile, Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Jung shows Shannon his nurturing side. Chelsea and Gerald get in the way of Janet's summer plans. Appa is invited to lead a business seminar but is forced to share the spotlight.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Knife Strife
programme.desc: Umma believes she has discovered a murder weapon. Janet realizes she and Nathan have nothing in common. At Handy, Kimchee struggles to fit in with the other regional managers.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Runs A Sweatshop
programme.desc: Gerry hatches a new "get rich quick" scheme selling counterfeit One Direction merchandise when he learns the band is in town.

programme.title: Mr. D: Re-Tired of Marking
programme.desc: When Gerry is suddenly promoted from sub to full-time teacher, his initial thrill is quickly squashed by the realization that he's back to real teaching responsibilities.

programme.title: Mr. D: Duncan vs. Bailey
programme.desc: When Gerry learns that former Olympic champion Donovan Bailey is coming to town, he's determined to seek retribution for a long-standing bone he has with the track "star".

programme.title: Mr. D: Student Teacher
programme.desc: When Gerry and Simon get student teachers, Gerry's hands-off approach fails; Bobbi starts taking supplements; Emma's characters bear a resemblance to some of the staff.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants A Union
programme.desc: Gerry decides to form a teachers union at Xavier; Malik bails on his janitorial duties; Lisa has a crush on Trudy's brother.

programme.title: Mr. D: Duncan Does Detention
programme.desc: Gerry is forced into covering Saturday detention; Robert and Lisa have a heart to heart.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Coaches Fencing
programme.desc: Gerry is assigned to help Ricki prepare for a fencing tournament; Bobbi invites Dwyer over for dinner in an attempt to seduce him.

programme.title: Mr. D: Hell-icopter Mom
programme.desc: Gerry is confronted by his overprotective and obnoxious mother; Bobbi tries to pawn off the role of staff punching bag; Ricki sells pencils to Robert.

programme.title: Mr. D: Out Cold
programme.desc: Gerry meets a beautiful woman while on a leadership retreat; Lisa learns of Trudy's gambling ring; Simon and Frank's game takes an ugly turn.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Turns 40
programme.desc: Upon his 40th birthday, Gerry finds a letter he wrote to himself 10 years ago; Simon's ferret goes missing; Lisa tries to impress the chairman of the board of trustees.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Does It Again
programme.desc: Picking up from last season, Gerry and Lisa attempt to navigate their new reality as a married couple.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Wants To Stay Married
programme.desc: While Lisa comes to her senses and decides to back out of the marriage, Gerry isn’t throwing in the conjugal towel quite as quickly.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Gets A Kid
programme.desc: When word spreads that a student’s wealthy father is on his deathbed and preparing to leave gifts for the student’s favorite staff, Gerry makes sure to ingratiate himself to the young boy.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Goes To Prison
programme.desc: In an effort to make some fast money before March break, Gerry takes a side job teaching in a prison.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Gerry steps into the role of a lifetime and finds himself bitten by the acting bug and reveling in the newfound attention.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Throws The Game
programme.desc: Gerry takes on the senior girls’ volleyball team. But when he realizes their semifinals will be interfering with his all-important social schedule, he sets out to sabotage them at the quarterfinals.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Man With Two Red Shoes
programme.desc: When Gerry learns of a lurker near the school, he sets out to catch said lurker and earn the Teacher of the Month title.
programme.sub-title: The Man With Two Red Shoes

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry Has Hot Sub Anxiety
programme.desc: Gerry is blown away by the hotness of the new substitute teachers and sets his sights on ‘hot-sub Mary,’ the new love of his life.

programme.title: Law & Order: I.D
programme.desc: When a young woman is murdered, her sister becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Shipments of poisoned African heroin are hitting the streets of Toronto. Junkies start dying and ICS must race to track down the smugglers. The investigation leads them to a flower merchant, his daughter, and a woman named Abi Mitchell.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: In a small village straddling the Quebec/Vermont border, a U.S. firetruck is held too long at customs, allowing a Canadian house to burn down. Long-simmering tensions erupt among the residents.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: In southern Alberta, an eco-terrorist sabotages a pumping station, and cracks the mainframe of Westech Oil. Gray and Layla travel to Calgary, where they uncover an international corporate espionage scheme.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: An American pop star collapses in New York city and her death is linked to a Canadian cancer medication, prescribed in Toronto and shipped across the border. Kessler and LaGarda investigate the Canadian pharmaceutical company responsible.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Last Laugh
programme.desc: While performing on the stage, the comedian Dougie Max dies. Grissom, Catherine and Capt. Brass investigate the conclude that he was poisoned by the expensive bottled water Innoko.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: When a private jet lands after a party, they find the trainer Lori Hutchins dead apparently stomped by the horse in the cargo bay. Grissom, Catherine, Nick and Capt. Brass investigate the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Inside The Box
programme.desc: A team of robbers heist the First Monument Bank and Detective Cyrus Lockwood is shot and murdered. The team investigate the case and find that the thieves wanted a specific safety deposit box in the vault.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: Andy’s romance with Det. Luke Callaghan gets complicated when he chooses her for a special assignment -serving a search warrant for a bullet lodged in the head of a witness to murder.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A severe heat wave wreaks havoc on the city, forcing the rookies to work around the clock to keep the peace. In the midst of the chaos, Andy discovers that a serial rapist may have resurfaced to prey on vulnerable teenage girls.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: After a routine speed trap leads to a messy accident on a city highway, Chris and Gail find one of the cars mysteriously empty and quickly realize that itslicense plate matches the one being broadcast in a citywide “Amber Alert”

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: When a private jet lands after a party, they find the trainer Lori Hutchins dead apparently stomped by the horse in the cargo bay. Grissom, Catherine, Nick and Capt. Brass investigate the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Inside The Box
programme.desc: A team of robbers heist the First Monument Bank and Detective Cyrus Lockwood is shot and murdered. The team investigate the case and find that the thieves wanted a specific safety deposit box in the vault.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pilot
programme.desc: A murder appears to be a suicide with very little evidence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Good Girl
programme.desc: A secret interracial romance ends in a young black man's death.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Big boss Anna is fuming when the squad finally return from Ibiza. Marnie's plan to get Aaron's attention backfires and the couple reach crisis point when Nathan gets involved. (S13, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Chloe gets jealous of Holly and Marty and kicks off. Scott receives some big news and there's a shock arrival which has huge consequences for Gaz and Chantelle. (S13, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It's seriously awks between Sophie, Gaz and Chantelle. Aaron finally returns but Marnie isn't happy. Chantelle and Marty clash over Chloe. Nathan takes getting mortal to the next level. (S13, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It's the morning after Chantelle's departure... Sophie gets some big news from boss Anna, Aaron ends up in an ambulance and Chloe goes all out to get over Marty at the pool party. (S13, ep6)

programme.desc: Traveling to San Diego, Hope and Allison look to learn how to handle huge caseloads and dangerous animals.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: A rare owl appears ready for release but everyone wonders if it will fly.

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: A family asks Lisa to help them find the perfect dog, but they end up falling in love with three.

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Edwina asks Lisa to find a dog for her two little girls.

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Lisa tries to find the right dog for a teenager who's been wary of dogs all her life.

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Dr. Lisa tries to find the right dog for a busy young family; the dog needs to get along with a toddler and three cats.

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Rescue cat Janet has a fused jaw and can't eat properly; Scott performs radical surgery; A school visit to help goats, Jack and Jill and a haircut for Scott turns into a consultation for the barber's beloved fluffy white dog.

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Australian vet Dr. Scott Miller works in his bustling clinic in London.

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Australian vet Dr. Scott Miller works in his bustling clinic in London.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Learn if super sniffers can sense a deadly snake, then sit in on pangolin rehab.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris travels to remote Christmas Island to help a seabird named Bill that is unable to fly.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Chris Brown and his team care for all creatures on Australia's Bondi Beach.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Two tiny orphans struggle to survive; Hope takes a second swing at a release gone wrong.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Rachel worries about orphaned Hawk who has an eye infection; Emily is called to help four young sable antelope who are bullied by an older dominant male.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Emily has a very tricky giraffe capture to oversee; Rachel worries about orphan Lily's progress; Emma releases six rehabilitated animals back into the wild.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: A pride of lions at Sibuya Game reserve need to be moved; the lions hit the headlines in 2018 after killing and eating some poachers.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Dr James' dad takes in Lucy, an injured star mermaid; Dr Kiara treats a wild anteater pig.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: Dr James operates on a small zebra finch; Dr Lucinda takes care of Froggie.

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife
programme.desc: Traveling to San Diego, Hope and Allison look to learn how to handle huge caseloads and dangerous animals.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: View risky cheetah anesthesia, meet mongooses, and bond with an orphan rhino.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is charged with abducting a baby.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is charged with abducting a baby.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A young criminal lawyer is thrown into the justice system.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A judge tries to save a mentally challenged man who has been charged with assault; Alice defends a man charged with sexual assault; Elliot is infatuated by a court interpreter.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: Alice tries to convince a couple that one of them must go to prison so that the other can stay home and raise their children.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: Elliot hires a private investigator to help with his case; Alice juggles two clients, one charged with assault and the other suspiciously eager to go to prison.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is charged with abducting a baby.

programme.title: This Is Wonderland
